eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Storey; Lyon; Carson City, NV; at 9:36 AM on JUL 24, 2019 Effective until 9:51 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Carson City authorities have issued a required weekly test for Carson City, Douglas County, Storey County, Lyon County and Alpine County. No action required
